corrected_fields.summary: The Bank of Canada resolved an internal computer systems issue from March 24, 2026, and will resume regular market operations, including the AM auction of Receiver General balances. This is an operational status update, not a research document.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This is an administrative notice confirming resumption of normal operations. It carries no macro catalyst or market structure significance and has no archival value as research content.
corrected_fields.macro_context: No macro catalyst content present. This is a status update regarding internal systems resolution with no implications for monetary policy, economic indicators, or market-moving information.
corrected_fields.market_structure_context: No market structure analysis. This is purely an operational notice confirming government securities auctions will proceed as scheduled.
